reviews.comment:
Hay una sola maquina de café.  Mucha demora en la atención,  .Café frio. No volveria.                                                      En cuanto a los baños 🚻 IMPECABLES CON UNA PERSONA QUE ESTA ATENTA Por  eso es mi puntaje

(Translated by Google)
There's only one coffee machine. It takes a long time to get service. The coffee is cold. I wouldn't return. As for the bathrooms: 🚻 SPOTLESS WITH A PERSON WHO IS ATTENTIVE. That's why I got my rating.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pCV05ISmZiVUV5WDB0U1RWTkpkRWhKTFZkZk1uYxAB

reviews.comment:
Definitivamente el ACA es "la esquina" de Villa la Angostura. El nuevo Full es impecable y la atenciòn de las chicas es excelente.

(Translated by Google)
ACA is definitely "the corner" in Villa la Angostura. The new Full Service is impeccable, and the staff is excellent.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2todVUyWllZamxzY0RkdVdUWm9SRkpJTWtGbVYyYxAB

reviews.comment:
El muchacho que nos atendió(creo que Lucas era su nombre) súper simpático, nos trató muy amablemente y nos explicó con detalle cada precio del menú, y las hamburguesas muy ricas! Sin dudas un lugar recomendable para descansar un ratito.

(Translated by Google)
The guy who served us (I think his name was Lucas) was super friendly. He treated us very kindly and explained every price on the menu in detail. The burgers were delicious! Definitely a great place to stop for a break.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tGNVh6aEhVMDFpWjBOc2JHSnlMVmg1Wmt3NGRYYxAB

reviews.comment:
Atención regular de el muchacho de la mañana , preguntamos por promociones y no nos respondió, nos atendió como si fuéramos una molestia, no nos ofreció ni cargarnos los puntos ypf, ni lo mínimo de un ciclo de servicio que se espera de una ypf, las chicas súper simpáticas y el lugar muy lindo. Por eso van las 3 estrellas

(Translated by Google)
The service from the guy in the morning was just okay. We asked about promotions and he didn't answer. He treated us like we were a nuisance, not even offering to add YPF points to our account, nor the bare minimum service you'd expect from a YPF station. The women there were super friendly and the place is very nice. That's why I'm giving it 3 stars.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xGVk9VdDFSV1pvVVRWeE0wTjBOWFkwVkZCV1pWRRAB

reviews.comment:
Pare en la nueva ypf full del aca en el centro de Villa la Angostura, lamentablemente se me ocurrió pedir una milanesa a la napolitana que ofrecen en el menú, me trajeron dos milanesitas calentadas en el microondas con 6 papel por encima de la milanesa y un pan qué ni siquiera lo cocinaron, le dije a la srta que me atendió que se lleve el pedido por que era lamentable, nadie se acercó a pedirme disculpas o ofrecerme otra cosa y tampoco la devolución del dinero.  Una pena realmente que el servicio sea de tan baja calidad.

(Translated by Google)
I stopped at the new YPF Full here in the center of Villa la Angostura. Unfortunately, I decided to order a Milanese à la Napolitana that they offer on the menu. They brought me two small Milanese heated in the microwave with 6 paper towels on top of the Milanese and a bun that they didn't even cook. I told the lady who served me to take the order because it was deplorable. No one came to apologize or offer me anything else, nor a refund. It's really a shame that the service is of such low quality.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25KdmFUZHpTVUo0Ukc5bU5scHBYMXBPU1dRMWNGRRAB

(Translated by Google)
The service is fast. The full package is good but small. Limited parking space.
